compiled_state.title: RED test: 5-stage chain integration test (brainstorm->preplanning->impl-plan->sprint->commit->epic-closure)
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Overview
Write the failing integration test for the full 5-stage preconditions chain. Tests that depth-agnostic reads work end-to-end and that cross-stage event_id references form a valid chain. This tests the EXECUTABLE preconditions-validator-lib.sh functions (not the instruction files), so standard behavioral TDD applies.

## File Impact
- Create: tests/integration/test-preconditions-chain-5stage.sh

## TDD Requirement
Write test_chain_brainstorm_to_preplanning_preconditions that simulates a brainstorm PRECONDITIONS write (via Story 1 writer helper) and verifies preplanning can read it (minimal tier, depth-agnostic).
Write test_chain_preplanning_to_impl_plan_preconditions that simulates preplanning write followed by impl-plan entry check.
Write test_chain_impl_plan_to_sprint_preconditions that simulates impl-plan write followed by sprint entry check.
Write test_chain_sprint_to_commit_preconditions that simulates sprint write followed by commit entry check.
Write test_chain_commit_to_epic_closure_preconditions that simulates commit write followed by epic-closure entry check.
Write test_chain_depth_agnostic_standard_tier_read that inserts a standard-tier event (with extra standard-tier fields) and verifies that a downstream validator accepts it (ignores extra fields, exit 0) — depth-agnostic forward-compat.
Write test_chain_event_id_links_form_valid_chain that verifies each stage's emitted event references the prior stage's event_id, forming a valid 5-event chain.

Given/When/Then for test_chain_depth_agnostic_standard_tier_read:
Given: a standard-tier PRECONDITIONS event fixture (with decisions_log, execution_context extra fields) written to a temp ticket dir
When: _dso_pv_entry_check is called with the stage referencing this event
Then: entry check returns exit 0 (unknown extra fields are ignored, not rejected)

## .test-index RED Markers Required
tests/integration/test-preconditions-chain-5stage.sh [test_chain_brainstorm_to_preplanning_preconditions]
tests/integration/test-preconditions-chain-5stage.sh [test_chain_preplanning_to_impl_plan_preconditions]
tests/integration/test-preconditions-chain-5stage.sh [test_chain_impl_plan_to_sprint_preconditions]
tests/integration/test-preconditions-chain-5stage.sh [test_chain_sprint_to_commit_preconditions]
tests/integration/test-preconditions-chain-5stage.sh [test_chain_commit_to_epic_closure_preconditions]
tests/integration/test-preconditions-chain-5stage.sh [test_chain_depth_agnostic_standard_tier_read]
tests/integration/test-preconditions-chain-5stage.sh [test_chain_event_id_links_form_valid_chain]

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file tests/integration/test-preconditions-chain-5stage.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/integration/test-preconditions-chain-5stage.sh
- [ ] All 7 test functions are present
  Verify: grep -c "^test_chain_" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/integration/test-preconditions-chain-5stage.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 7)}'
- [ ] Tests FAIL before T12 is applied (chain not fully wired)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/integration/test-preconditions-chain-5stage.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "FAIL\|not found"
- [ ] .test-index updated with RED markers for all 7 functions
  Verify: grep -q '\[test_chain_brainstorm_to_preplanning_preconditions\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] Tests use temp dirs for isolation (no shared mutable state between runs)
  Verify: grep -q 'mktemp\|TMPDIR\|tmp_dir' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/integration/test-preconditions-chain-5stage.sh
- [ ] validate.sh --ci passes
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci

## Retry Budget
MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 (sonnet model)
On 3 consecutive sonnet failures: escalate to opus with full diagnostic context
On 3 consecutive opus failures (6 total): escalate to user
If MAX_AGENTS: 0 at sonnet→opus escalation time: skip opus step, escalate to user immediately
